mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_company WHERE company_type = 'BUYER'
AND (company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR business_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

SELECT company_id AS companyId, tenant_id AS tenantId, company_type AS companyType, company_name AS companyName, business_no AS businessNo, ceo_name AS ceoName, postal_code AS postalCode, address1, address2, phone, email, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM tb_company WHERE company_id = #{companyId}

SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, user_name AS userName, mobile, email, role AS userRole, status, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM tb_user WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT tenant_id AS id, tenant_name AS name FROM tb_tenant WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT channel_id AS id, channel_name AS name FROM tb_channel WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT company_id AS id, company_name AS name FROM tb_company WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND company_type = 'BUYER' AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user ( tenant_id, company_id, channel_id, login_id, password_hash, user_name, mobile, email, role, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{companyId}, #{channelId}, #{loginId}, #{passwordHash}, #{userName}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{userRole}, 'ACTIVE', NOW() )

INSERT INTO tb_company_contact ( company_id, contact_name, contact_role, mobile, email, is_primary, linked_user_id, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{contactName}, #{contactRole}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{isPrimary}, #{linkedUserId}, 'ACTIVE', NOW() )
